description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows build test that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a Windows 2019 job with a matrix strategy for 32-bit and 64-bit architectures. For each architecture, check out the repository with submodules, set up Ninja, cache and install GStreamer and Qt, create a build environment, configure CMake with Ninja, build the project in parallel, and upload the resulting executable artifact.
